title: conyza foetida
intro: Conyza foetida, also known as fetid conyza, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which make it useful for treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of Conyza foetida include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Conyza foetida can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in traditional medicine as a paste or powder for topical application.
